hero.title: Manage Your Invoices with Ease
hero.subtitle: Create, track, and manage professional invoices in seconds. Built for freelancers and small businesses.

features.heading: Everything You Need
features.subheading: Powerful tools to streamline your invoicing workflow from start to finish.

invoicing.title: Smart Invoicing
invoicing.description: Create and send professional invoices with automatic calculations, tax support, and PDF export.

dashboard.title: Real-time Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track revenue, outstanding payments, and invoice status at a glance with interactive charts.

templates.title: Custom Templates
templates.description: Design your own invoice templates with a live editor and apply them to any invoice.

multilingual.title: Multi-language
multilingual.description: Full support for English, Albanian, Macedonian, and Dutch with easy locale switching.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Built on Next.js with server-side rendering for instant page loads and smooth navigation.

secure.title: Secure by Default
secure.description: Enterprise-grade authentication and row-level security powered by Supabase.

highlights.heading: Why Choose Invoice Manager?
items: Create invoices in under a minute
Export to PDF with one click
Track paid, pending, and overdue invoices

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Start managing your invoices professionally today — it only takes a minute.
